    4. Central Coast

    Central Coast Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

    19 senior living communities in the Central Coast region of California, organized by city.

    How California regulates senior care

    Assisted living and residential care homes are licensed as RCFEs by the Community Care Licensing Division; skilled nursing facilities are certified by CMS and licensed by the California Department of Public Health. License & inspection lookup: California Department of Social Services, Community Care Licensing Division.

    New to this?

    Start with how to choose a facility, levels of care, and the touring checklist.

    • AlmaVia of Camarillo

      Camarillo, CA

      • Assisted Living
      • Memory Care

      A nonprofit, faith-based assisted living and memory care community in Camarillo, part of the Elder Care Alliance network.

      • Memory Care

      An Atria assisted living and memory care community in Ventura County.

    Carmel, CA · Monterey County

    • The Cottages of Carmel

      Carmel, CA

      • Assisted Living
      • Memory Care

      Assisted living and memory care community on Carmel Rancho Boulevard near Carmel-by-the-Sea. Costs start around $6,120 per month.

    Monterey, CA · Monterey County

    • Cypress Ridge Care Center

      Monterey, CA

      • Skilled Nursing
      • Respite Care

      A 99-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Monterey with a restful, scenic setting and 24-hour licensed nursing.

    • Terms of Service
    • Privacy Policy

    Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families, and the resident's quality of life comes first here - then the family, then the facility. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice - for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Listings are never paid placements. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities. Terms · Privacy.
